_readme: This controls the 'লাইভ দেখুন' (Watch Live) button(s). IMPORTANT HONESTY NOTE: there is no single global free legal source for every match - free vs paid depends on your country and which league. Each rule now has a 'links' ARRAY so multiple legitimate sources can be shown side by side as fallbacks (if one is down, viewers can try another). type 'link' opens an official/legal source in a new tab. type 'embed' should ONLY ever be used with a genuinely OFFICIAL embeddable stream URL (e.g. FIFA's own official YouTube live embed) - never an unofficial/pirated stream. Rules are checked top to bottom, first match wins; match.competition checks the competition code (WC, PL, CL, PD, BL1, SA, FL1, DED, PPL, ELC, BSA, EC), match.teamContains checks team names, match.stage checks the match stage. Do NOT add unofficial/pirated re-stream sites here - only rights-holder broadcasters or legal aggregators.

rules._comment: World Cup 2026 - Bangladesh: BTV (state TV, completely free-to-air), Somoy TV and T Sports are the official linear-TV rights holders (consortium deal with FIFA). Toffee (Banglalink) is the official digital/streaming rights holder. Listed as fallbacks in case one is temporarily down.

_howToAddOfficialEmbed: Example, only with a real official embeddable URL: { "links": [ { "label": "অফিসিয়াল লাইভ দেখুন", "type": "embed", "url": "https://www.youtube.com/embed/VIDEO_ID" } ], "match": { "stage": "FINAL" } }
_clubFootballNote: For club football (Premier League, La Liga, etc) after the World Cup, free full-match broadcasters vary week to week and country to country - there usually isn't a single fixed free channel. The default links above send viewers to a legal 'where to watch' finder instead of guessing wrong. Add specific rules here if you find a reliable free source for your country.
